validation_command: cd "Hb Track - Backend" && python ../scripts/ssot/gen_docs_ssot.py && python -c "import json; spec=json.load(open('docs/ssot/openapi.json')); paths=[p for p in spec.get('paths',{}) if 'alert' in p.lower() and ('step18' in p.lower() or 'suggestion' in p.lower() or 'training' in p.lower())]; ids=('team_id','alert_id','suggestion_id'); bad=[p+':'+pr.get('name') for p in paths for _,d in spec['paths'][p].items() if isinstance(d,dict) for pr in d.get('parameters',[]) if pr.get('name') in ids and pr.get('in')=='path' and pr.get('schema',{}).get('format')!='uuid']; assert not bad,'FAIL:'+str(bad); print('PASS:'+str(len(paths))+' paths, all UUID')"
